data.address: Mumbai Bengaluru Highway, Jalahalli Cross Junction, Peenya, Bengaluru, Karnataka. Pin-560058 (India)

forecast.label: Historical Pattern-Based Forecast — NOT real-time prediction

metadata.label: Historical Pattern-Based Forecast — NOT real-time prediction
metadata.assumption: Patterns from the 23-week dataset (Nov 2023–Apr 2024) repeat in the future.
metadata.limitation: Cannot account for one-off events, weather, or policy changes.

pipeline: Raw CSV (8,173 rows) → Data Cleaning → Feature Engineering → Shadow Event Discovery → SERI Computation → Forecast Engine → Similarity Index
methodology.timestamp_note: Timestamps are UTC. IST = UTC + 5:30. Peak incidents at 2-3 AM IST reflect freight vehicles (restricted from Bengaluru daytime entry).

shadow_event.definition: A (corridor, day_of_week, time_bucket_ist) combination that appears in at least 1 of 23 weeks.

forecast.recent_trend: incident count in last 4 weeks / max across all slots
forecast.holdout: Last 2 weeks of dataset used as pseudo-actuals for MAE validation
forecast.label: Historical Pattern-Based Forecast — NOT real-time prediction

hotspots.method_a: Corridor rank by Σ risk_weight, normalized to [0,1]
hotspots.method_b: DBSCAN: eps=0.008° (~889m at Bengaluru lat), min_samples=10

assumptions: Patterns from Nov 2023–Apr 2024 are representative of typical Bengaluru traffic.
risk_weight multipliers (1.5× High, 2× accident) are domain heuristics, not empirically calibrated.
limitations: Cannot account for one-off events, weather, or policy changes.
end_datetime is 94% null — no incident duration analysis possible.

agent.advisory: Heavy congestion expected due to structural damage.
